_publications._publicationTitle: Small Extracellular Vesicles Derived from NF2-Associated Schwannoma Cells Modulate Tumor Progression and Immunity via HSP90.

_contextSnippet: Our analysis revealed a correlation between HSP90 expression and the activation of pAKT and pERK
details: Successfully detected correlation between HSP90 expression and AKT phosphorylation in NF2-associated schwannoma cells
